name: skin-disease-backend
description: Express backend to serve skin disease ML models

scripts.dev:all: concurrently -k -n IMAGE,TEXT,BACKEND -c yellow,cyan,green "npm run model:image" "npm run model:text" "npm run dev"
scripts.start:all: concurrently -k -n IMAGE,TEXT,BACKEND -c yellow,cyan,green "npm run model:image" "npm run model:text" "npm run start"
